goal: Provision and execute only one owner-authorized T0702 protected GitHub Actions Raw-only Beta run from the exact merged main commit. The run must archive and remotely recover exactly one deterministically verified inbound Moomoo-related Gmail message, emit aggregate-only public evidence, perform zero Gmail mutation, and contain no Parser, M3, Processed, Timeline, schedule or final-publication authority.
scope: T0702 and S7AC-002 only; no T0703 or later release phase
one controlled pull request and merge of the cumulative verified candidate to current main solely to enable T0702 Beta; this is not final publication
read-only verification of the MetaDatabase repository identity, visibility, current main identity and existing moomooau-beta Environment before mutation
configure the existing moomooau-beta Environment with no manual reviewer and a main-only deployment branch policy
create at most one private data repository and at most one GitHub App, or reuse only an independently verified exact match
limit the GitHub App to contents write and metadata read, install it on exactly the one private data repository and verify numeric identities
generate one age identity and one 32-byte opaque ID key without committing or logging either value, then provision exactly six Environment Secret values
read Gmail metadata only to establish an evidence-backed active sender registry; no unverified message may receive a full RAW read
exact control repository, owner, actor, main ref, workflow ref, run, attempt and expected commit binding before any Secret read
one workflow_dispatch with owner confirmation and protected moomooau-beta Environment on the exact merged commit
same-tree Local Synthetic Alpha authority hash and completed-Beta aggregate release gate
exact six-name Beta Secret allowlist with no implicit Secret enumeration
one single-use Raw-only runtime with explicit budget one, deterministic sender registry, capacity freshness, GitHub App/private repository identity and age identity binding
full RAW fetch only after metadata verification, append-only age ciphertext commit and remote recovery
aggregate-only successful evidence with Gmail, Processed, M3 and Timeline effects fixed to zero
local task oracle, type, workflow-policy, package, status, publication and Stage 7 preflight validation before delivery
after the protected run, preserve truthful local evidence for later final whole-package publication without a second main delivery in this run
non_goals: a second control-repository branch push, pull request, main delivery, workflow dispatch or rerun
manual GitHub Environment approval, required reviewer or wait timer
any GitHub App permission beyond contents write and metadata read or installation on more than one repository
full RAW reads for unknown, ambiguous or non-deterministically-verified messages
running Parser, M3, Processed, Timeline, Release Asset, Gmail Trash, 04:30 schedule, GA, Recovery Drill or Patch Lifecycle
claiming any T0703 or later task, any unrelated final Acceptance, production health, Stage 7 or RMD-06 complete
performing the final whole-package review or review remediation in this run
treating the single controlled Beta-enablement main delivery as final publication
protected_oracles: owner-created moomooau-beta GitHub Environment with no manual reviewer and a main-only deployment branch policy
six exact protected Beta Secret values provisioned only to that Environment
explicit Beta message budget one and fresh capacity evidence
active sender registry whose candidates have been independently verified
single private data repository numeric identity and installed least-privilege GitHub App numeric identity
age identity bound to the configured recipient and held only in verified runner tmpfs
one main-bound owner workflow_dispatch on the exact expected commit after the same-tree Alpha gate
one through-budget real verified Raw-only observation with zero non-Moomoo full reads and 100 percent remote recovery
zero Gmail, Processed, M3 and Timeline mutations during Beta
final S7AC-002 and linked AC-001, AC-004 and AC-007 protected verdicts
ordering_resolution: The Owner explicitly authorized one controlled PR and merge to main solely to enable T0702 protected Beta, with no manual Environment approval and no authority for M3 or final publication. The previous no-intermediate-upload ordering blocker is resolved only for this single delivery and dispatch.
rollback: Before dispatch, any failed gate stops the run with no Gmail or Raw effect. After dispatch, retain every Gmail original and every valid remotely recovered Raw ciphertext; do not delete recoverable evidence. Disable further dispatch by withholding any second authorization. Reverting the control repository or deleting cloud resources requires separate owner authority and is not part of this run.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest, inherited product contract or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the workflow can run from a non-main ref, non-GitHub-hosted runner, repeated run attempt, unexpected repository/owner/actor, unexpected commit, non-manual event or unapproved Environment
the controlled main delivery or protected dispatch budget would exceed one
the existing Environment cannot be verified as moomooau-beta with no manual reviewer and a main-only branch policy
the data repository is not private, is not the sole Beta repository, or the GitHub App is installed on anything other than that one repository
the GitHub App requests or receives any permission beyond contents write and metadata read
any required credential would be committed, logged, exposed to a public API response or retained in an unapproved local plaintext file
any Secret outside the exact six Beta names can reach the protected runtime
a Secret can be read before repository, owner, actor, ref, workflow and expected-SHA validation
zero or more than one verified message can produce a PASS observation
sender identity, trusted Authentication-Results alignment or active registry evidence is ambiguous, guessed or unavailable
a non-deterministically-verified candidate can trigger full RAW fetch or any Raw commit
capacity evidence is unavailable, stale, future-dated, RED or UNKNOWN
remote recovery is not one hundred percent for every archived Raw object
Gmail mutation, Parser, M3, Processed, Timeline, schedule, control-repository write or retained plaintext authority enters the Beta path
aggregate evidence can contain a Gmail message, thread, sender, subject, attachment or private repository identifier
a second main delivery, second dispatch, rerun, manual approval, M3 action or final publication becomes necessary
